cues.label: Start at the ends
cues.headline: Widest pair first
cues.narration: Left on the smallest, right on the largest: 1 and 11.

cues.label: Too big, drop right
cues.narration: The sum overshoots, so the largest value is hopeless — retreat the right pointer.

cues.label: Too small, push left
cues.narration: Now the sum is under, so advance the left pointer for a bigger value.

cues.label: Zig-zag inward
cues.headline: Each step kills a column
cues.narration: 11 over, retreat right; 9 under, advance left — the pointers converge.

cues.label: Found it
cues.narration: The pair meets the target at indices 2 and 3.

cues.label: Why linear
cues.headline: Pointers only move inward
cues.narration: Each pointer takes at most n steps and they never rescan, so the search is O(n).
